name: Gary Gulman
bio: Gary Gulman is an American stand-up comedian known for elaborate, precisely built observational comedy and a former football player and accountant turned comic. A Last Comic Standing finalist, he is widely admired for his viral Conan set on how the states got their two-letter abbreviations. His HBO special The Great Depresh blends stand-up with a candid account of his hospitalization for depression.

timeline.ev: Begins performing at Boston-area open mics
Finishes third on Last Comic Standing season 2
State-abbreviations set on Conan goes viral; Netflix special It's About Time
HBO special The Great Depresh, on his depression and recovery
Memoir Misfit; Max special Born on Third Base

accolades: Viral acclaim for the state-abbreviations bit
Critically praised for The Great Depresh and Born on Third Base

bits.t: How The States Got Their Abbreviations
